name: loopd
description: Synchronous multi-phase dev task runner for Claude Code — planning → implementation → review in a single window with workspace-isolated git worktrees.

plugins.name: loopd
plugins.description: Run /dev-task to kick off a planning → implementation → review pipeline in the current Claude Code window. Synchronous, workspace-isolated execution — no daemon, no Slack bridge.

plugins.name: orchestrator
plugins.description: Experimental autonomous GitHub issue resolution loop. Lead Claude thread + issue-analyzer / tester / issue-scout teammates auto-invoke loopd /dev-task. Requires loopd plugin and CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1.
